title: carlina frigida subsp. frigida
intro: Carlina frigida subsp. frigida, also known as the alpine carline thistle, is a perennial herb that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Carlina frigida subsp. frigida include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
